common_composites.text: Incidence of Major Adverse Cardiovascular Events (MACE)

MACE (time to event): MACE (time to event): myocardial infarction, unstable angina, cardiovascular death, revascularization, fatal/nonfatal cerebrovascular accident, peripheral arteriopathy, aortic event
Composite adverse event incidence (MACE/MALE) : myocardial infarction, ischemic stroke, acute limb ischemia, major amputation due to vascular disease
